prerequisites: A Primetric account with administrator access, which is required to create API credentials.
A registered API application in Primetric that yields a client_id and a client_secret.
Both required config fields available to the connector: client_id and client_secret.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 client credentials
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the Primetric API using OAuth 2.0. Provide the client_id and client_secret secret fields; these are exchanged at Primetric's token endpoint for a short-lived bearer access token, which is then sent on each API request as an Authorization: Bearer header.

setupSteps.title: Create an API application in Primetric
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Primetric as an administrator and open the integrations / API applications area in the admin settings. Create a new application configured for the client credentials flow so it can be used for server-to-server access by the connector.

setupSteps.title: Record the client_id and client_secret
setupSteps.body: After creating the application, copy the generated client_id and client_secret. Treat the client_secret as a sensitive credential and store it securely. Both values are required and cannot be recovered later if the secret is regenerated.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied client_id and client_secret into the connector's required config fields (client_id and client_secret). The connector uses these to obtain an OAuth access token from Primetric and to call the Primetric API on your behalf.
